name: CALM
description: CALM (Coding Agent Liveness Map) — code-intelligence MCP server for coding agents.

plugins.name: calm
plugins.description: Adds the CALM MCP server: call-graph-aware locate/source/edit_symbol/diff_impact and 22 tools total for navigating and safely editing a codebase, backed by a multi-tier resolver (syntactic -> Stack Graphs -> SCIP) instead of grep.
